zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Knightley於1369年出生在英國瓦維其可爾卻斯特頓時，他的父親Sir John Knightley25歲，母親Elizabeth de Burgh29歲。他於1390年與Joan de Thornbury在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾格諾薩爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1416年7月5日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾卻斯特頓享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾卻斯特頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Knightley于1369年出生在英国瓦維其可爾卻斯特頓时，他的父亲Sir John Knightley25岁，母亲Elizabeth de Burgh29岁。他于1390年与Joan de Thornbury在英国英格兰斯塔福爾格諾薩爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1416年7月5日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾卻斯特頓享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾卻斯特頓。

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Knightley was born in 1369, in Chesterton, Warwickshire, England, his father, Sir John Knightley, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth de Burgh, was 29. He married Joan de Thornbury in 1390, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 5 July 1416, in Chesterton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Chesterton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Knightley est né en 1369, à Chesterton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Knightley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Burgh, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Thornbury en 1390, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 juillet 1416, à Chesterton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Chesterton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Knightley 1369 in Chesterton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Knightley 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Burgh 29. Er hat 1390 in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Joan de Thornbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Juli 1416 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Chesterton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Chesterton, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Knightley è nato il nel 1369 nel Chesterton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Knightley, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Burgh, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Thornbury nel 1390, nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 luglio 1416, nel Chesterton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Chesterton, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Knightleyが1369年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアチェステルトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Knightleyは25歳，母Elizabeth de Burghは29歳であった。1390年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルでJoan de Thornburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1416年7月5日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアチェステルトンで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアチェステルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Knightley(이)가 1369년 영국 워윅실르 체스터턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Knightley(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Burgh(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 Joan de Thornbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1416년 7월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 체스터턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 체스터턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Knightley nasceu em 1369, em Chesterton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Knightley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Burgh, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Thornbury em 1390, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de julho de 1416, em Chesterton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Chesterton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Knightley родился в 1369 г. в местности честиртон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Knightley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Burgh, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Thornbury в 1390 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 июля 1416 г. в местности честиртон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности честиртон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Knightley nació en 1369, en Chesterton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Knightley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Burgh, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Joan de Thornbury en 1390, en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de julio de 1416, en Chesterton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Chesterton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
